nasb.text: and know His will and approve the things that are essential, being instructed out of the Law,

esv.text: and know his will and approve what is excellent, because you are instructed from the law;

cnv.text: 而且明白他的旨意，又從律法得了教導，能夠辨別甚麼是好的，

ccb.text: 你受过律法的教导，知道上帝的旨意，能明辨是非；

csbs.text: 又从律法中受教，明白神的旨意，也能分辨是非；
